full_text:
Wu the Baliff 吳押獄
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wu the Baliff (吳押獄). Looked after the jailed Hua Tuo and was given his black bag so he could become a doctor. Wu the Baliff is a fictional character. Wu the Baliff was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
